zh.lifeSummary: 當John Goodrich於1568年9月8日出生在英國素福爾可賀瑟特時，他的父親Adam Goodrich28歲，母親Anne Borwell29歲。他於1592年與Martha Smith在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1626年3月1日之前在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Goodrich于1568年9月8日出生在英国素福爾可賀瑟特时，他的父亲Adam Goodrich28岁，母亲Anne Borwell29岁。他于1592年与Martha Smith在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1626年3月1日之前在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Goodrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Goderiche, Old English Gōdrīc, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ + rīc ‘power’.
English: habitational name from Goodrich (Herefordshire), a shortened form for ‘castle Goodrich’, which takes its name from Godric Mapson, a holder of the estate recorded in the Domesday Book.
Americanized form of German Güttrich, cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Goodrick
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Goodrich  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Goodrich was born on 8 September 1568, in Hessett, Suffolk, England, his father, Adam Goodrich, was 28 and his mother, Anne Borwell, was 29. He married Martha Smith in 1592, in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died before 1 March 1626, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Goodrich est né le 8 septembre 1568, à Hessett, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Adam Goodrich, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anne Borwell, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Martha Smith en 1592, à St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé avant 1 mars 1626, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Goodrich am 8. September 1568 in Hessett, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Goodrich 28 und seine Mutter Anne Borwell 29. Er hat 1592 in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Martha Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb vor 1. März 1626 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England und wurde in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Goodrich è nato il il 8 settembre 1568 nel Hessett, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Adam Goodrich, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Anne Borwell, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Martha Smith nel 1592, nel St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì prima del 1 marzo 1626, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Goodrichが1568年9月8日にイギリススフォルクヘセットで生まれた時，父Adam Goodrichは28歳，母Anne Borwellは29歳であった。1592年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズスト マリ'ス チャーチでMartha Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1626年3月1日以前にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffo: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Goodrich(이)가 1568년 9월 8일 영국 수폴크 헤싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Goodrich(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Borwell(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 Martha Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1626년 3월 1일 이전 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.8 September 1568–before 1 March 1626: 8 de setembro de 1568–antes 1 de março de 1626
pt.St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffo: St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra
pt.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom

pt.St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffo: St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Goodrich nasceu em 8 de setembro de 1568, em Hessett, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Goodrich, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anne Borwell, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha Smith em 1592, em St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1 de março de 1626, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Goodrich родился 8 сентября 1568 г. в местности хессетт, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam Goodrich было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Borwell, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Smith в 1592 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер перед 1 марта 1626 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Goodrich nació el 8 de septiembre de 1568, en Hessett, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Goodrich, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anne Borwell, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Martha Smith en 1592, en St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió antes de 1 de marzo de 1626, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
